summary: Retired wireframe polyhedra (US-069/US-071) and cube lattice (US-068/US-072) modes from rotation. Removed their system creation, single rotation entries, and registry factories from main.ts. Removed compound modes 'cloud+wireframe' and 'pointcloud+cubelattice' from COMPOUND_MODE_DEFS, and cleaned up the dead 'wirepolyhedra'/'cubelattice' cases from primaryCountForSystem. Added retirement comments to wireframePolyhedra.ts, cubeLatticeWireframe.ts, and cubeLattice.ts generator. Kept quality profile properties (enableElectricArc, arcSubdivisions, etc.) that are still used by constellation overlay. Updated stale test expectations in US-061/US-064/US-066/US-068 tests to reflect 2 compound modes instead of 4. Remaining rotation: 7 single modes (particles, ribbon, pointcloud, crystal, flowribbon, fractalgrowth, terrain) + 2 compound modes (particles+flowribbon, pointcloud+fractalgrowth). Build passes, all 1991 tests pass.
